properties.name: jeap.health.metric.update-rate-seconds
properties.description: How often the health indicator is queried to produce the state of the 'health' metric. Set to -1 to disable the health metric.

properties.name: jeap.health.metric.contributor-metrics.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable the export of individual health contributor statuses as separate metrics.

properties.name: jeap.monitor.metrics.truststore.enabled
properties.description: Whether to export trust store metrics. Only effective when the javax.net.ssl.trustStore properties are set.

properties.name: jeap.monitor.metrics.rest.maximum-allowable-jeap-relation-metrics
properties.description: Upper bound for the number of distinct jEAP relation REST metrics that are exported. Once the limit is reached, further metrics are dropped to avoid metric cardinality explosion.

properties.name: jeap.monitor.metrics.security.maximum-allowable-metrics
properties.description: Upper bound for the number of distinct REST security metrics that are exported. Once the limit is reached, further metrics are dropped to avoid metric cardinality explosion.
